name: session-busy-4009
_note: The 4009 'session busy' condition. CANONICALLY this is a JSON-RPC rejection (HermesGatewayError code 4009, detected by isSessionBusyError) returned to a mutating request such as prompt.submit while a turn is running, NOT an event notification. It therefore never flows through classifyHermesEvent on the response path. This fixture models the case where a gateway surfaces the same condition as an in-band error event so the classifier's error branch carries the 4009 code: expected kind error, code 4009. The replay test additionally documents the RPC-rejection path in a dedicated assertion.
